privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: OniricApp takes your privacy seriously. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, and with whom we share it.
privacy.s1Body: We collect your name and email address when you create an account; the dream content you enter for interpretation; and payment data processed directly by Stripe (we never store credit card details).
privacy.s2Body: We use your data to authenticate your session, send your dreams to OpenRouter's AI model to generate interpretations, process payments through Stripe, and send you transactional emails such as password recovery via Resend.
privacy.s3Body: We share data with: Stripe (payments), OpenRouter (AI inference), Google (OAuth), Resend (emails), Vercel (hosting), and Neon (database). Each operates under its own privacy policy.
privacy.s4Body: You may request deletion of your account and all your data by writing to leramirezca@gmail.com. Data is deleted within 30 days of your request.
privacy.s5Body: All communications are encrypted with TLS. Passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes. Session tokens are managed by NextAuth v5.
privacy.s6Body: For questions about this policy, contact us at leramirezca@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using OniricApp you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully before using the service.
terms.s1Body: OniricApp is an AI-assisted dream interpretation platform. Interpretations are generated by AI models and are intended for informational and entertainment purposes.
terms.s2Body: The Premium plan is billed monthly and renews automatically until you cancel. You may cancel at any time from your profile → Subscription; you will retain access through the end of the paid period. We do not offer refunds for partial periods.
terms.s3Body: You may not use the service to generate harmful content, perform automated scraping, or attempt to compromise the security of the platform.
terms.s4Body: OniricApp's interpretations do not constitute medical, psychological, or clinical advice or diagnosis. If you experience sleep problems or mental health concerns, please consult a healthcare professional.
terms.s5Body: OniricApp is provided "as is". We make no guarantees as to the accuracy of interpretations or continuous service availability. Our maximum liability is limited to amounts paid in the last 12 months.
terms.s6Body: For questions about these terms, contact us at leramirezca@gmail.com.

Support.title: Support Center
Support.subtitle: Answers to the most frequently asked questions
Support.contactDesc: Didn't find what you were looking for? Write to us directly.
Support.a1: You describe your dream in the text field and our AI model analyzes it from a psychoanalytic perspective. The model identifies symbols, emotions, and patterns to generate a personalized interpretation. Premium users access Anthropic's Claude model, which offers greater depth and accuracy.
Support.q2: What's the difference between the Free and Premium plans?
Support.a2: The Free plan allows 3 interpretations per day without an account (5 if registered) using the basic model. The Premium plan offers unlimited interpretations with Anthropic's Claude model, access to the private dream journal, and full history.
Support.q3: How do I cancel my Premium subscription?
Support.a3: Go to your profile → Subscription → Cancel subscription. You can also manage your payment directly in the Stripe portal. You will retain Premium access through the end of your current billing period.
Support.q4: How do I reset my password?
Support.a4: On the sign-in screen, click "Forgot password?". Enter your email and you'll receive a reset link valid for 1 hour. If you signed in with Google, you don't have a password to reset.
Support.a5: Yes. Your dream content is sent to the AI models solely to generate the interpretation and is not used to train models. Journal entries are visible only to you.
